control_owner.authorization: trusted dispatcher capability plus explicit approval

PublishDispatch.risk: externally visible dispatch with uncertain completion

transitions.evidence: one-time approval bound to stream, final cut, dispatch id, route, and destination
ambiguous destination state after bounded checks
receipt confirmed and pending ledger empty
permanent failure and pending ledger empty

global_interrupts.deferred_behavior: record pending cancellation, reconcile dispatch, then honor cancellation
record pending timeout, reconcile dispatch, then honor timeout
block new work, reconcile dispatch, then terminate on budget

budgets.soft_boundary: stop new attempts and persist a reconciliation handoff before the hard boundary

no_progress.fingerprint: hash of dispatch id, destination, attempt class, and reconciliation observations
no_progress.gain_metric: new independent destination evidence or a typed outcome
no_progress.calibration: fixed conservative v1 threshold for the bounded two-attempt dispatcher
no_progress.plateau_comparator: both bounded reconciliation checks add less than epsilon

effects.delivery_semantics: at-least-once with destination reconciliation and deduplication when supported
effects.durable_ledger: approval, intent, attempt, response, receipt, acknowledgement, and pending interrupts
effects.high_risk_gate: PublishDispatch is reachable only through WAIT_DISPATCH_AUTH then DISPATCH_INTENT
effects.unknown_outcome: enter DISPATCH_UNKNOWN and never blindly retry

checkpoint.compatibility: resume only an immutable compatible workflow version
checkpoint.migration: explicit state-schema migration with an audit record
checkpoint.fencing: single-runner lease token is checked on every commit
checkpoint.monotonic_sequence: checkpoint sequence and aggregate version increase together
checkpoint.integrity: checksum state, pending effects, dispatch envelope, and version envelope
checkpoint.corruption_outcome: enter CORRUPT and quarantine the run

approval.revocation: revocation before intent commit invalidates approval
approval.stale_outcome: return to WAIT_DISPATCH_AUTH and require a fresh approval

verification.success_predicate: destination receipt binds the approved dispatch id, final cut, route, destination, and workflow version
invariant_checks: terminal states have no outgoing transitions
verification.environment_evidence: destination receipts and response hashes are independent of producer prose
verification.evaluator_independence: receipt verifier does not produce the dispatch payload
verification.human_gray_band: ambiguous effect outcome enters DISPATCH_UNKNOWN for operator reconciliation
verification.calibration: freeze receipt fixtures and report false confirmations and false unknowns

replay.resume: continue from compatible durable state under a fresh fenced lease
replay.trajectory_replay: reconciliation may observe new destination evidence and diverge

security.untrusted_content: adapter responses are data and cannot authorize transitions
security.tool_least_privilege: dispatch credentials are isolated behind the exact dispatcher capability
security.provenance_snapshots: store adapter identity, destination hash, response hash, and retrieval time
security.secret_isolation: event payloads and judgment adapters never receive dispatch credentials

trace.redaction: secrets, raw credentials, and sensitive destination payloads are excluded

icvc.inform: canonical event chain, final cut, dispatch id, destination, and adapter version
icvc.constrain: exact capability, approval, fenced intent, hard budgets, and deferred interrupts
icvc.verify: independent destination receipt, reconciliation, integrity checks, and fault fixtures
icvc.correct: bounded retry and typed reconciliation only; no efficacy or self-correction claim
